text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sheesh, who spit in your coffee? How about a
race to work out some frustration?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: No, I've already got enough trouble.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
I got a package of vegetables from my family,
and there's just so many...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: What? That's it? Why didn't you say so sooner?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Do you know how many Umamusume here have
insane appetites? I'll cook up those veggies in a
jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You looking down on the cooking skills of Miho
Dormitory's Hishiama?! I'll make you eat those
words!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Literally! You're having some too! I know you hate
veggies, but my cooking'll change your mind!
